Iconography

This section outlines the VSDS icon design principles to help you create or apply icons consistently. A unified icon language enhances interface recognition and improves usability across the product.

  • Overview
  • Icon library

Icon library

Open sourced VSDS icons in all 3 themes

 

Icon library

Our icons are organized in ascending order for easy navigation and consistency. The icon library provides a clear overview of styling and visual tone, making it simple to find what you need.
Before creating a new icon, always check the existing library to see if a suitable icon already exists, this helps maintain visual consistency and avoids unnecessary duplication.

 

❖ vsds-icon / vsds-icon / vsds-icon
